resilience_invariants.authority_safety_posture: Invariants prevent rollback or restore from obscuring already-persisted legal evidence.
resilience_invariants.operator_visible_effect: SRE and release teams can audit whether one invariant blocked a rollout, reopen, or restore claim.
resilience_invariants.recovery_posture: Invariants remain fail-closed guards for promotion, rollback, restore, and fail-forward.
resilience_invariants.state_or_outcome: No production promotion without a recorded DeploymentRelease.
resilience_invariants.trigger_or_entry_condition: The release and resilience control plane validates its non-negotiable invariants.

resilience_invariants.authority_safety_posture: Invariants prevent rollback or restore from obscuring already-persisted legal evidence.
resilience_invariants.operator_visible_effect: SRE and release teams can audit whether one invariant blocked a rollout, reopen, or restore claim.
resilience_invariants.recovery_posture: Invariants remain fail-closed guards for promotion, rollback, restore, and fail-forward.
resilience_invariants.state_or_outcome: No migration without a reversible or fail-forward-compatible plan.
resilience_invariants.trigger_or_entry_condition: The release and resilience control plane validates its non-negotiable invariants.

resilience_invariants.authority_safety_posture: Invariants prevent rollback or restore from obscuring already-persisted legal evidence.
resilience_invariants.operator_visible_effect: SRE and release teams can audit whether one invariant blocked a rollout, reopen, or restore claim.
resilience_invariants.recovery_posture: Invariants remain fail-closed guards for promotion, rollback, restore, and fail-forward.
resilience_invariants.state_or_outcome: No queue dependency that makes durable truth unrecoverable after broker loss.
resilience_invariants.trigger_or_entry_condition: The release and resilience control plane validates its non-negotiable invariants.

resilience_invariants.authority_safety_posture: Invariants prevent rollback or restore from obscuring already-persisted legal evidence.
resilience_invariants.operator_visible_effect: SRE and release teams can audit whether one invariant blocked a rollout, reopen, or restore claim.
resilience_invariants.recovery_posture: Invariants remain fail-closed guards for promotion, rollback, restore, and fail-forward.
resilience_invariants.state_or_outcome: No restore declared successful until audit continuity and privacy reconciliation are verified.
resilience_invariants.trigger_or_entry_condition: The release and resilience control plane validates its non-negotiable invariants.

resilience_invariants.authority_safety_posture: Invariants prevent rollback or restore from obscuring already-persisted legal evidence.
resilience_invariants.operator_visible_effect: SRE and release teams can audit whether one invariant blocked a rollout, reopen, or restore claim.
resilience_invariants.recovery_posture: Invariants remain fail-closed guards for promotion, rollback, restore, and fail-forward.
resilience_invariants.state_or_outcome: No rollback that rewrites or obscures already-persisted legal/compliance evidence.
resilience_invariants.trigger_or_entry_condition: The release and resilience control plane validates its non-negotiable invariants.

resilience_invariants.authority_safety_posture: Invariants prevent rollback or restore from obscuring already-persisted legal evidence.
resilience_invariants.operator_visible_effect: SRE and release teams can audit whether one invariant blocked a rollout, reopen, or restore claim.
resilience_invariants.recovery_posture: Invariants remain fail-closed guards for promotion, rollback, restore, and fail-forward.
resilience_invariants.state_or_outcome: No desktop rollout without a documented compatibility window and emergency disable or pin path.
resilience_invariants.trigger_or_entry_condition: The release and resilience control plane validates its non-negotiable invariants.

restore_drill_requirements.authority_safety_posture: Restore of authority-integrated workloads must rebuild outstanding work from durable receipts and control packets.
restore_drill_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Release and DR reviewers can inspect the exact restore proof used for promotion or reopen.
restore_drill_requirements.recovery_posture: Restore claims remain tied to exact checkpoints, candidate tuples, and reopen gates.
restore_drill_requirements.state_or_outcome: Restore drills verify control store, audit store, object store, and secret metadata recovery.
restore_drill_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: Promotion, DR, or reopen logic claims restore capability or successful checkpoint verification.

restore_drill_requirements.authority_safety_posture: Restore of authority-integrated workloads must rebuild outstanding work from durable receipts and control packets.
restore_drill_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Release and DR reviewers can inspect the exact restore proof used for promotion or reopen.
restore_drill_requirements.recovery_posture: Restore claims remain tied to exact checkpoints, candidate tuples, and reopen gates.
restore_drill_requirements.state_or_outcome: Promotion or DR restore drills record the exact checkpoint, outcome, and verification basis through RecoveryCheckpoint, RestoreDrillResult, and ReleaseVerificationManifest.
restore_drill_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: Promotion, DR, or reopen logic claims restore capability or successful checkpoint verification.

restore_drill_requirements.authority_safety_posture: Restore of authority-integrated workloads must rebuild outstanding work from durable receipts and control packets.
restore_drill_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Release and DR reviewers can inspect the exact restore proof used for promotion or reopen.
restore_drill_requirements.recovery_posture: Restore claims remain tied to exact checkpoints, candidate tuples, and reopen gates.
restore_drill_requirements.state_or_outcome: Checkpoint cannot claim VERIFIED without bound restore evidence, privacy reconciliation, audit continuity, queue rebuild verification, authority rebuild, and binding revalidation.
restore_drill_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: Promotion, DR, or reopen logic claims restore capability or successful checkpoint verification.

restore_drill_requirements.authority_safety_posture: Restore of authority-integrated workloads must rebuild outstanding work from durable receipts and control packets.
restore_drill_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Release and DR reviewers can inspect the exact restore proof used for promotion or reopen.
restore_drill_requirements.recovery_posture: Restore claims remain tied to exact checkpoints, candidate tuples, and reopen gates.
restore_drill_requirements.state_or_outcome: Read-side rebuild or cache repair replays persisted manifests, workflow items, gate records, authority records, receipts, and audit evidence rather than copying projection tables back into truth.
restore_drill_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: Promotion, DR, or reopen logic claims restore capability or successful checkpoint verification.

restore_drill_requirements.authority_safety_posture: Restore of authority-integrated workloads must rebuild outstanding work from durable receipts and control packets.
restore_drill_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Release and DR reviewers can inspect the exact restore proof used for promotion or reopen.
restore_drill_requirements.recovery_posture: Restore claims remain tied to exact checkpoints, candidate tuples, and reopen gates.
restore_drill_requirements.state_or_outcome: Restore of authority-integrated workloads rebuilds outstanding transmit and reconciliation work from persisted AuthorityIngressReceipt, AuthorityInteractionRecord, SubmissionRecord, and inbox truth.
restore_drill_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: Promotion, DR, or reopen logic claims restore capability or successful checkpoint verification.

restore_drill_requirements.authority_safety_posture: Restore of authority-integrated workloads must rebuild outstanding work from durable receipts and control packets.
restore_drill_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Release and DR reviewers can inspect the exact restore proof used for promotion or reopen.
restore_drill_requirements.recovery_posture: Restore claims remain tied to exact checkpoints, candidate tuples, and reopen gates.
restore_drill_requirements.state_or_outcome: Restore of previously erased data triggers privacy reconciliation before normal user access reopens.
restore_drill_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: Promotion, DR, or reopen logic claims restore capability or successful checkpoint verification.

restore_drill_requirements.authority_safety_posture: Restore of authority-integrated workloads must rebuild outstanding work from durable receipts and control packets.
restore_drill_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Release and DR reviewers can inspect the exact restore proof used for promotion or reopen.
restore_drill_requirements.recovery_posture: Restore claims remain tied to exact checkpoints, candidate tuples, and reopen gates.
restore_drill_requirements.state_or_outcome: Failover and failback remain auditable events with explicit operator ownership.
restore_drill_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: Promotion, DR, or reopen logic claims restore capability or successful checkpoint verification.

rollback_boundary_states.authority_safety_posture: Rollback never deletes or rewrites legal authority truth, audit history, or submitted artifacts.
rollback_boundary_states.operator_visible_effect: Release operators can see whether a release remained rollback-safe or crossed into fail-forward-only posture.
rollback_boundary_states.recovery_posture: Rollback legality remains a reader-window and client-window governed boundary.
rollback_boundary_states.trigger_or_entry_condition: A DeploymentRelease or compatibility gate evaluates rollback safety.

rollback_boundary_states.authority_safety_posture: Rollback never deletes or rewrites legal authority truth, audit history, or submitted artifacts.
rollback_boundary_states.operator_visible_effect: Release operators can see whether a release remained rollback-safe or crossed into fail-forward-only posture.
rollback_boundary_states.recovery_posture: Rollback legality remains a reader-window and client-window governed boundary.
rollback_boundary_states.trigger_or_entry_condition: A DeploymentRelease or compatibility gate evaluates rollback safety.

rollout_strategy_state_alignment.authority_safety_posture: FAILED_FORWARD requires compensating release and owner; ROLLED_BACK is unlawful when FAIL_FORWARD_ONLY.
rollout_strategy_state_alignment.operator_visible_effect: Release dashboards can distinguish canary abort, rollback, baseline pin, and compensating fail-forward posture.
rollout_strategy_state_alignment.recovery_posture: Rollout strategy and state remain semantically aligned with rollback and fail-forward posture.
rollout_strategy_state_alignment.trigger_or_entry_condition: DeploymentRelease serializes a rollout strategy and rollout state combination.

rollout_strategy_state_alignment.authority_safety_posture: FAILED_FORWARD requires compensating release and owner; ROLLED_BACK is unlawful when FAIL_FORWARD_ONLY.

rollout_strategy_state_alignment.trigger_or_entry_condition: DeploymentRelease serializes a rollout strategy and rollout state combination.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Rollback never deletes or rewrites legal authority truth, audit history, or submitted artifacts.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Release operators can see whether a release remained rollback-safe or crossed into fail-forward-only posture.
rows.recovery_posture: Rollback legality remains a reader-window and client-window governed boundary.
